entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: Skills Focus: Practice applying drawing skills with the brush and watercolor techniques. Practice underpainting. Grow in watercolor abilities by continued practice. Draw spheres; study body proportions, foreshortening, curvature, overlapping, texture drawing, and highlighting. Color theory: notan, contrast, monochrome, color studies, and circular value scales.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
If students are in grade 6-8, they should begin with the fast-track lessons and then move on to Level 4. 

Prerequisite: Level 5 or appropriate skill proficiency.

rows.label: Art: Level 6
rows.books: Brush Drawing as Applied to Natural Forms and Common Objects, Drawing, Design, and Craft-Work
